conservative.name: Homeward Bound
conservative.requirements: 3 favour, must toss a coin into a body of water as you set out on a journey to a place you have been before

success.description: You receive a general impression of the right direction to reach your destination, which you can discern as a manoeuvre at any time

boon.description: You gain sufficient insight into the route to add to a single check related to continuing your journey

sigmarsComet.description: On invoking this blessing, you gain a comprehensive sense of the best route and estimated travel time

reckless.name: Outward Bound
reckless.requirements: 3 favour, must toss a coin into a body of water as you set out on a journey to a place you're never been before

success.description: You receive a general impression of the right direction to reach your destination, which you can discern as a manoeuvre at any time

boon.description: You gain sufficient insight into the route to add to a single check related to continuing your journey

sigmarsComet.description: You gain sufficient insight into the route to add to a single check related to continuing your journey
